topic.angle: air purifier guide for small rooms: CADR, filter types, noise levels, and running costs

instructions: Write one bilingual draft (en+ko, draft:true) with contentProfile:buying-guide. Follow docs/templates/buying-guide.md and docs/CONTENT_STANDARDS.md. Season priority: summer; active events: 여름·방학, 폭염·냉방. Run npm run content:validate, then set status to complete.
lastError: Cursor agent: Default local agent storage requires the built-in node:sqlite module (Node >= 22.13, or another runtime that implements node:sqlite). Upgrade Node, or configure a custom store: Cursor.configure({ local: { store: new JsonlLocalAgentStore(rootDir) } }) or pass local.store / store on Agent.create and Agent.resume.
